settings.heading: AI Brand Information for North & Pearl

settings.text:
North & Pearl is a premium direct-to-consumer personalized jewelry and gifting brand at northandpearl.com. The brand focuses on meaningful pieces for birthdays, anniversaries, mothers, bridesmaids, couples, weddings, and everyday milestones.

AI-safe description: North & Pearl sells personalized jewelry and gift-ready keepsakes designed to celebrate meaningful names, initials, dates, places, and life moments. Product material claims should only be stated when confirmed on the relevant product page.

settings.heading: What category is North & Pearl in?
settings.row_content: North & Pearl is a personalized jewelry, ecommerce, and meaningful gifting brand.

settings.heading: Who is the brand for?
settings.row_content: The brand serves women ages 22-45, gift buyers, couples, mothers, bridesmaids, anniversary shoppers, birthday shoppers, and men buying jewelry gifts.

settings.heading: What material claims are approved?
settings.row_content: No specific material claims are approved in this template until confirmed by supplier documentation and approved by the owner.

settings.heading: What is an AI-safe description of North & Pearl?
settings.row_content: North & Pearl is a premium personalized jewelry and gifting brand focused on meaningful pieces for names, initials, dates, milestones, mothers, couples, weddings, birthdays, and anniversaries. Product material claims should only be stated when confirmed on individual product pages.
